title: Remove login option and make admin page publicly accessible

requirements.summary: Remove all Internet Identity login/logout UI elements from the Navigation component so no login button or user authentication controls are visible to any user.
acceptanceCriteria: The Navigation bar has no login button, logout button, or any Internet Identity authentication controls
No authentication-related UI is visible on any page

file_operations.description: Remove the login/logout button and all Internet Identity UI elements from the navigation bar. Keep the InternetIdentityProvider wrapper intact (as per constraints), but remove all visible authentication controls including the login button, logout functionality, and any user status indicators. Preserve the logo, menu navigation, and categories dropdown.

requirements.summary: Make the Admin page (/admin), Create Blog Post page (/admin/create), and Edit Blog Post page (/admin/edit/:id) fully accessible to all visitors without any authentication check, identity guard, or access-denied redirect.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating directly to /admin shows the admin posts list without any login prompt or access-denied screen
Navigating to /admin/create shows the create post form without any authentication requirement
All admin actions (create, edit, delete, publish/unpublish) are available to all users without login
The AccessDeniedScreen component is never rendered for admin routes
No identity or principal checks gate any admin page or mutation

file_operations.description: Confirm that AdminRoute is already a passthrough component (renders children directly without guards). If any authentication or authorization logic exists, remove it completely so the component unconditionally renders its children without checking identity, role, or admin status.

Remove any remaining authentication or identity checks that might block access to the admin posts page. Ensure the page renders the posts list and admin controls (create, delete, publish/unpublish) for all visitors without requiring login. Remove any conditional rendering based on authentication state or role.

Remove any authentication or identity checks that might block access to the create post form. Ensure the form and submission logic work for all visitors without requiring login. Remove any conditional rendering or guards based on authentication state.

Remove any authentication or identity checks that might block access to the edit post form. Ensure the form pre-population and update submission work for all visitors without requiring login. Remove any conditional rendering or guards based on authentication state.

requirements.summary: Update all React Query hooks and mutations in useQueries.ts that pass an authenticated actor to instead use an anonymous actor for all admin operations (create post, update post, delete post, publish/unpublish post, upload images).
acceptanceCriteria: Creating, editing, deleting, and publishing blog posts all succeed when the user is not authenticated
Image uploads for blog posts work without authentication
No mutation fails silently due to missing identity or principal

file_operations.description: Update all admin-related mutations (useCreatePost, useUpdatePost, useDeletePost, useSetPublishedState, useUploadImage, and any inline image upload logic) to use an anonymous actor instead of an authenticated actor. Ensure these mutations do not require or check for authentication/identity before executing. Verify all mutations work without a logged-in user by removing any identity-dependent logic.
